option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Window x:Class="Greenhouse_Control.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:local="using:Greenhouse_Control" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:controls="using:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="Greenhouse Control">
<Window.SystemBackdrop> <MicaBackdrop /> </Window.SystemBackdrop>
<Grid Padding="16" RowSpacing="12"> <Grid.Background> <LinearGradientBrush StartPoint="0,0" EndPoint="0,1"> <GradientStop Color="#FF1F8A6B" Offset="0" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF1B6F61" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF2B3B3F" Offset="0.5" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF1B1D1F" Offset="1" /> </LinearGradientBrush> </Grid.Background> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="*" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Grid ColumnSpacing="16"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto" /> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontFamily="Segoe UI Variable Display" FontSize="32" FontWeight="SemiBold" Text="Greenhouse Control" /> </Grid>
<ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled"> <Grid RowSpacing="12"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="Connection:" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="White" />
<Border Grid.Row="1" Width="554" Background="#2B000000" BorderBrush="#FF2A3A3D" BorderThickness="0" CornerRadius="12" Padding="12">
<Grid ColumnSpacing="12"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="*" /> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Column="0" Background="#3A000000" BorderBrush="#FF2F4A4E" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="10" Padding="10"> <TextBox Header="Greenhouse IP" PlaceholderText="IP Address" Text="{Binding IpAddress, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Width="150" /> </Border>
<Border Grid.Column="1" Background="#3A000000" BorderBrush="#FF2F4A4E" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="10" Padding="10"> <TextBox Header="Greenhouse Port" PlaceholderText="Port Number" Text="{Binding PortText, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Width="150" /> </Border>
<Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#3A000000" BorderBrush="#FF2F4A4E" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="10" Padding="10" HorizontalAlignment="Left">
<Button x:Name="ConnectButton" Width="140" Height="36" Content="Connect" Click="ConnectButton_Click" /> </Border> </Grid> </Border>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Text="Configuration:" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="White" />
<ContentControl Grid.Row="3" IsEnabled="{Binding IsReady}"> <Border x:Name="ConfigurationPanel" Width="554" Background="#2B000000" BorderBrush="#FF2A3A3D" BorderThickness="0" CornerRadius="12" Padding="12">
<Grid RowSpacing="4"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="*" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<controls:SettingsCard Grid.Row="0" Width="530" Description="Toggle the lighting inside the greenhouse." Header="Greenhouse lighting"> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <ToggleSwitch IsOn="{Binding IsLightingOn, Mode=TwoWay}" Toggled="LightingToggle_Toggled" /> </controls:SettingsCard>
<controls:SettingsExpander Grid.Row="1" VerticalAlignment="Top" Description="Settings for automatic watering." Header="Automatic Watering" Width="530"> <controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon> <ToggleSwitch IsOn="{Binding IsAutoWaterOn, Mode=TwoWay}" Toggled="AutoWaterToggle_Toggled" />
<controls:SettingsExpander.Items> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Dispense amount" Description="Change how many seconds the water pump will run when activated."> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8"> <Slider Minimum="1" Maximum="60" Width="120" Value="{Binding DispenseSeconds, Mode=TwoWay}" ValueChanged="DispenseSlider_ValueChanged" PointerReleased="DispenseSlider_PointerReleased" PointerCaptureLost="DispenseSlider_PointerCaptureLost" LostFocus="DispenseSlider_LostFocus" /> <TextBlock Text="{Binding DispenseSeconds}" VerticalAlignment="Center" /> </StackPanel> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Watering Frequency" Description="Change how many hours between each automatic watering cycle."> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8"> <Slider Minimum="1" Maximum="48" Width="120" Value="{Binding FrequencyHours, Mode=TwoWay}" ValueChanged="FrequencySlider_ValueChanged" PointerReleased="FrequencySlider_PointerReleased" PointerCaptureLost="FrequencySlider_PointerCaptureLost" LostFocus="FrequencySlider_LostFocus" /> <TextBlock Text="{Binding FrequencyHours}" VerticalAlignment="Center" /> </StackPanel> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> </controls:SettingsExpander.Items> </controls:SettingsExpander>
<controls:SettingsExpander Grid.Row="2" VerticalAlignment="Top" Description="Power-related controls." Header="Power options" Width="530"> <controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon>
<controls:SettingsExpander.Items> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Turn off the greenhouse"> <Button Content="Shutdown" Click="ShutdownButton_Click" /> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Reboot and start the greenhouse again"> <Button Content="Restart" Click="RestartButton_Click" /> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Start water pump" Description="Toggle button to start the water pump."> <ToggleButton Content="Start" Checked="PumpToggle_Checked" Unchecked="PumpToggle_Unchecked" /> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> </controls:SettingsExpander.Items> </controls:SettingsExpander> </Grid> </Border> </ContentControl> </Grid> </ScrollViewer> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Window x:Class="Greenhouse_Control.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:local="using:Greenhouse_Control" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" xmlns:controls="using:CommunityToolkit.WinUI.Controls" mc:Ignorable="d" Title="Greenhouse Control">
<Window.SystemBackdrop> <MicaBackdrop /> </Window.SystemBackdrop>
<Grid Padding="16" RowSpacing="12"> <Grid.Resources> <LinearGradientBrush x:Key="ConnectedGradient" StartPoint="0,0" EndPoint="0,1"> <GradientStop Color="#FF1F8A6B" Offset="0" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF1B6F61" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF2B3B3F" Offset="0.5" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF1B1D1F" Offset="1" /> </LinearGradientBrush> <LinearGradientBrush x:Key="DisconnectedGradient" StartPoint="0,0" EndPoint="0,1"> <GradientStop Color="#FFB04A57" Offset="0" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF8D3644" Offset="0.2" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF51242C" Offset="0.5" /> <GradientStop Color="#FF1B0F12" Offset="1" /> </LinearGradientBrush> </Grid.Resources> <Rectangle x:Name="DisconnectedBackground" Fill="{StaticResource DisconnectedGradient}" Opacity="1" IsHitTestVisible="False" Grid.RowSpan="2" /> <Rectangle x:Name="ConnectedBackground" Fill="{StaticResource ConnectedGradient}" Opacity="0" IsHitTestVisible="False" Grid.RowSpan="2" />
<Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="*" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<Grid ColumnSpacing="16"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto" /> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontFamily="Segoe UI Variable Display" FontSize="32" FontWeight="SemiBold" Text="Greenhouse Control" /> </Grid>
<ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled"> <Grid RowSpacing="12"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="Connection:" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="White" />
<Border Grid.Row="1" Width="554" Background="#2B000000" BorderBrush="#FF2A3A3D" BorderThickness="0" CornerRadius="12" Padding="12">
<Grid ColumnSpacing="12"> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto" /> <ColumnDefinition Width="*" /> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
<Border Grid.Column="0" Background="#3A000000" BorderBrush="#FF2F4A4E" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="10" Padding="10"> <TextBox Header="Greenhouse IP" PlaceholderText="IP Address" Text="{Binding IpAddress, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Width="150" /> </Border>
<Border Grid.Column="1" Background="#3A000000" BorderBrush="#FF2F4A4E" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="10" Padding="10"> <TextBox Header="Greenhouse Port" PlaceholderText="Port Number" Text="{Binding PortText, Mode=TwoWay, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Width="150" /> </Border>
<Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#3A000000" BorderBrush="#FF2F4A4E" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="10" Padding="10" HorizontalAlignment="Left">
<Button x:Name="ConnectButton" Width="140" Height="36" Content="Connect" Click="ConnectButton_Click" /> </Border> </Grid> </Border>
<TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Text="Configuration:" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="White" />
<ContentControl Grid.Row="3" IsEnabled="{Binding IsReady}"> <Border x:Name="ConfigurationPanel" Width="554" Background="#2B000000" BorderBrush="#FF2A3A3D" BorderThickness="0" CornerRadius="12" Padding="12">
<Grid RowSpacing="4"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="Auto" /> <RowDefinition Height="*" /> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<controls:SettingsCard Grid.Row="0" Width="530" Description="Toggle the lighting inside the greenhouse." Header="Greenhouse lighting"> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <ToggleSwitch IsOn="{Binding IsLightingOn, Mode=TwoWay}" Toggled="LightingToggle_Toggled" /> </controls:SettingsCard>
<controls:SettingsExpander Grid.Row="1" VerticalAlignment="Top" Description="Settings for automatic watering." Header="Automatic Watering" Width="530"> <controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon> <ToggleSwitch IsOn="{Binding IsAutoWaterOn, Mode=TwoWay}" Toggled="AutoWaterToggle_Toggled" />
<controls:SettingsExpander.Items> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Dispense amount" Description="Change how many seconds the water pump will run when activated."> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8"> <Slider Minimum="1" Maximum="60" Width="120" Value="{Binding DispenseSeconds, Mode=TwoWay}" ValueChanged="DispenseSlider_ValueChanged" PointerReleased="DispenseSlider_PointerReleased" PointerCaptureLost="DispenseSlider_PointerCaptureLost" LostFocus="DispenseSlider_LostFocus" /> <TextBlock Text="{Binding DispenseSeconds}" VerticalAlignment="Center" /> </StackPanel> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Watering Frequency" Description="Change how many hours between each automatic watering cycle."> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8"> <Slider Minimum="1" Maximum="48" Width="120" Value="{Binding FrequencyHours, Mode=TwoWay}" ValueChanged="FrequencySlider_ValueChanged" PointerReleased="FrequencySlider_PointerReleased" PointerCaptureLost="FrequencySlider_PointerCaptureLost" LostFocus="FrequencySlider_LostFocus" /> <TextBlock Text="{Binding FrequencyHours}" VerticalAlignment="Center" /> </StackPanel> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> </controls:SettingsExpander.Items> </controls:SettingsExpander>
<controls:SettingsExpander Grid.Row="2" VerticalAlignment="Top" Description="Power-related controls." Header="Power options" Width="530"> <controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsExpander.HeaderIcon>
<controls:SettingsExpander.Items> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Turn off the greenhouse"> <Button Content="Shutdown" Click="ShutdownButton_Click" /> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Reboot and start the greenhouse again"> <Button Content="Restart" Click="RestartButton_Click" /> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> <controls:SettingsCard Header="Start water pump" Description="Toggle button to start the water pump."> <ToggleButton Content="Start" Checked="PumpToggle_Checked" Unchecked="PumpToggle_Unchecked" /> <controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> <FontIcon Glyph="" /> </controls:SettingsCard.HeaderIcon> </controls:SettingsCard> </controls:SettingsExpander.Items> </controls:SettingsExpander> </Grid> </Border> </ContentControl> </Grid> </ScrollViewer> </Grid> </Window>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
